title: betula pendula subsp. pendula
intro: Betula pendula subsp. pendula, commonly known as the silver birch, is a subspecies of the Betula pendula species, a deciduous tree native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of compounds such as salicin and flavonoids. The health benefits of Betula pendula subsp. pendula include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the silver birch include teas, tinctures, and infusions made from the bark, leaves, or sap, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
